name: consumer-pipeline
description: Unified Kafka consumer pipeline — ChromaDB, ClickHouse, Wikipedia, Graph, Skill Updater, Eval

scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.k8s:deploy: kubectl apply -f k8s/base/namespace.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/base/secrets.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/base/configmap.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/data-stores/ && kubectl apply -f k8s/base/consumers.yaml
scripts.topics:list: node -e "import {Kafka} from 'kafkajs'; import {config} from './src/shared/config.js'; const k = new Kafka({clientId:'cli',brokers:config.kafka.brokers,ssl:config.kafka.ssl}); const a = k.admin(); await a.connect(); console.log(await a.listTopics()); await a.disconnect();"
